---

## README.md Content

Full content was read successfully. Here is a summary:

**Job Copilot** вЂ” AI-powered job application autofiller. Bring your own LLM endpoint. MIT license.

Key points:
- **Resume в†’ Profile extraction**: Paste resume, click "Extract", LLM fills profile (name, email, phone, LinkedIn, GitHub, etc.)
- **Verified profile**: User reviews and edits before use
- **Form autofill**: Personal fields from profile, custom questions from AI
- **Bring your own LLM**: Any OpenAI-compatible endpoint (OpenAI, llama.cpp, Ollama, vLLM, Nyro)
- **Saved Q&A bank**: Answers auto-save, reuse across applications
- **Works on any ATS**: Workday, Greenhouse, Lever, Oracle Cloud, iCIMS, etc.
- **Review before submit**: Nothing submitted automatically
- **Private**: All data in browser, no external servers except LLM endpoint
- **Installation**: Load unpacked extension from `extension/` folder in Chrome

**Interactive architecture diagram**: Available at [https://shivam2014.github.io/job-copilot/](https://shivam2014.github.io/job-copilot/) or locally in `ARCHITECTURE_VISUAL.html`.

**Development**: `git clone ...` then edit in `extension/` and reload in `chrome://extensions`.

---

## Key Findings

- **Chrome Extension MV3**: Content script injected on all URLs. Uses `storage`, `activeTab`, `scripting` permissions.
- **File sizes**: `form-detector.js` (935+ lines), `content.js` (2154+ lines), `options.js` (1436+ lines) вЂ” these are the largest files.
- **Tests**: `vitest.config.js` points to `tests/**/*.test.js`, but no test files were found at probed paths. The `tests/` directory exists but I could not list its files.
- **No .env**: No environment file found.
- **Dependencies**: `chrome-launcher`, `pdfjs-dist` (runtime); `jsdom`, `playwright`, `vitest`, `ws` (dev).

content.text:
## Findings

**~/job-copilot** вЂ” Chrome extension (MV3) for AI-powered job application autofill. BYO LLM endpoint. MIT licensed.

### Files

```
~/job-copilot/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ README.md
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ package.json
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ARCHITECTURE_VISUAL.html
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ LICENSE
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ .gitignore
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ vitest.config.js
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ tests/                          (empty/no test files found)
в””в”Ђв”Ђ extension/
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ manifest.json
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ icons/
    в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ icon16.png
    в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ icon48.png
    в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ icon128.png
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ lib/
    в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ token-tracker.js
    в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ llm-client.js
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ content/
    в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ form-detector.js        (935+ lines)
    в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ content.js              (2154+ lines вЂ” largest)
    в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ content.css
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ background/
    в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ background.js
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ popup/
    в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ popup.html
    в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ popup.js
    в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ popup.css
    в””в”Ђв”Ђ options/
        в”њв”Ђв”Ђ options.html
        в”њв”Ђв”Ђ options.js              (1436+ lines)
        в””в”Ђв”Ђ options.css
```

### What it does

1. **Profile extraction** вЂ” paste resume в†’ LLM extracts structured profile (name, email, LinkedIn, GitHub, etc.)
2. **Form autofill** вЂ” personal fields from profile, custom questions answered via AI
3. **Q&A bank** вЂ” answers auto-save and reuse across applications
4. **Works on any ATS** вЂ” Workday, Greenhouse, Lever, iCIMS, Oracle Cloud
5. **Private** вЂ” all data in browser, only outbound call is to your LLM endpoint

### Dev setup

- `git clone` в†’ edit in `extension/` в†’ reload in `chrome://extensions`
- Supports any OpenAI-compatible endpoint (OpenAI, Ollama, llama.cpp, vLLM, Nyro)
- Vitest configured but no test files found under `tests/`
- Interactive architecture diagram at `ARCHITECTURE_VISUAL.html`

### Notable

- **No tests written yet** вЂ” `vitest.config.js` exists, `tests/` dir exists, but empty
- **No .env/.env.example** вЂ” API config handled via extension options UI
- **Heaviest files**: `content.js` (2154 lines), `options.js` (1436 lines), `form-detector.js` (935 lines)
